response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack generalist with senior experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, including some distributed-systems work at Sociomantic. However, the role demands 8 years of C++ and this resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments (2014–2015). There is also no clear track record of formal technical leadership over cloud/DevOps engineers or ownership of a large-scale internal cloud compute platform, so the fit against the minimum qualifications is weak.
strengths: Long senior tenure across multiple stacks with shipped products at scale
Some high-throughput distributed-systems exposure (Sociomantic, millions of req/s)
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS, public talks
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ vs. the 8-year minimum required
No explicit cloud compute platform or large-scale infra leadership role
No documented experience formally leading or mentoring a cloud/DevOps team

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
